title: Hermes Skill Package Anatomy
brief: A technical diagram of a Hermes skill package. Center: a folder box containing SKILL.md as the entry document. Around it, four supporting folders: references/, templates/, assets/, scripts/. Use concentric or layered visualization to show progressive disclosure: outer layer is skills_list() showing only name, description, category; middle layer loads SKILL.md full content; inner layer loads support files on demand. Clean flat infographic style, soft professional colors, clear labels, bilingual Chinese-English.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Hermes Skill Package Anatomy'. Diagram type: article illustration. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A technical diagram of a Hermes skill package. Center: a folder box containing SKILL.md as the entry document. Around it, four supporting folders: references/, templates/, assets/, scripts/. Use concentric or layered visualization to show progressive disclosure: outer layer is skills_list() showing only name, description, category; middle layer loads SKILL.md full content; inner layer loads support files on demand. Clean flat infographic style, soft professional colors, clear labels, bilingual Chinese-English.
